data.content: Implementation review failed: RetakesView still resolves existing running sessions and rolling ancestors by bare beat ID across all loaded repos, so duplicate beat IDs in different repos can still collide. Specifically, shippingByBeatId is keyed only by terminal.beatId (src/components/retakes-view.tsx:489-495), existingRunning matches only t.beatId === beat.id (src/components/retakes-view.tsx:628-630), and parentByBeatId is still a single map keyed only by beat.id after merging all repos (src/components/retakes-view.tsx:575-580). This violates the requirement that Retake Now keep ancestry and running-session lookups repo-scoped.
